tagline: Explore the city. Solve the mystery.
enterCodeBelow: Enter the code your team leader shared
teamCodeHint: You'll get a 6-character join code to share.
shareThisCode: Share this code with your team
shareText: I completed a TrailTale quest in {{duration}}!
chooseQuestSub: Pick a city adventure to begin
loadError: Couldn't load quests. Check your connection.

gdpr.title: Before you start
gdpr.body: TrailTale stores your nickname and a device identifier to track your progress and display the leaderboard. Data is automatically deleted after 7 days. You can request deletion at any time.
gdpr.checkboxLabel: I agree to the temporary storage of my nickname and device ID for the purpose of playing the quest.

recovery.title: Save your recovery code
recovery.body: If you switch devices or clear your browser, enter this code to continue your progress. It can only be shown once.
recovery.resumeBody: Enter the 6-character code you received when you started playing.
recovery.notFound: Code not found or quest already finished.
